timeline.notes: Original release with Adventure and Survival modes. Cap loss on death was active. Per-weapon/per-creature damage curves were the primary system.
Battle royale mode added. NW.esm loaded as conditional overlay with completely different damage formula (base 329, linear armor), zeroed XP/VATS/AP costs. ZAX narrator with 620 voice files.
Subscription service with private servers. Survival mode removed around this time.
NPCs added. Beckett companion with original 17-quest arc (later cut to 15, The Bone removed, Poseidon finale simplified). Visitor corpse added to The Deep.

Level scaling reworked. Legendary perk slots added at levels 50/75/100/150/200/300. Universal tier system likely introduced around this period for damage/health/armor scaling. Wanamingo plushie added.
ZeniMax/Bethesda acquired by Microsoft for $7.5B. Azure AI infrastructure now available to Bethesda studios.
NW mode shut down. 1,874 records ZZZ_-disabled in ESM. NW.esm kept as master file. Client code, NW perk cards, Vault 51 map, matchmaking, ZAX dialogue all remain in game files.
Instanced dungeon system. Trogg creatures, Jersey Devil, Overgrown enemies added.
Perks consolidated from multi-rank to single-rank. CUT_ prefix records for rank 4/5 perks likely deprecated around this time. Death cap loss on PvE death removed.
Storm content (StormBoss, Scorchtongue), Vault 63, Wanamingo corpse (Storm_WanamingoCorpse_MSTT). Moon_SQ03_Libby quest record found in NW.esm — bethesda putting new content in the NW plugin.

The profiling build we analyzed. Contains 6,146 named functions, 3,625 source paths, 121,780 dev-only strings, 641 dev-only RTTI classes, 57 bot scripts. Build path: e:\buildagent\work\820e97cc99338fb0\project76\
Additional Skyline Valley content. Thrasher (RadTurkey) creatures added.
4-star legendary effects datamined from PTS. Universal tier system for legendary scaling. Bruiser effect among the new 4-stars.
CAMP pets (cats, dogs) released. Hard Bargain perk consolidated to single rank (7 CHA when bartering). EN06 Guardian boss.
Casino system, NukaWorld on Tour content. E09A prefix content (Bloatfly Launcher weapon cut from this era). Jersey Devil, Overgrown creatures.
The Feb 2026 exe we used for signature comparison. 101MB.

Current live version. Bounty hunting system with Walter Goggins ghoul NPC. Burning Springs, Highway Town. RustKing raiders. Bigfoot, Ogua, DustDevil creatures. 6,083 Backwoods records, 79,198 total new records since dev build.
Build 1.7.23.40-RelPC-peach-beaver-PC. The retail exe we analyzed. Codename peach-beaver.

data_trust_notes.active_values: Legendary effects, mutations, perk descriptions, GMST game settings — verified against active OMOD/CURV chains
data_trust_notes.universal_tiers: Damage (100 tiers), armor (100 tiers), creature health (60 tiers) — the current scaling system. per-item curves are legacy originals within 1-6 points
data_trust_notes.legacy_curves: Per-weapon damage curves, death cap loss, some economy curves — original design values, may not reflect current live game
data_trust_notes.patched_values: Fast travel costs (25% reduction applied), vendor pricing (CHA caps at 20-25), perk ranks (many consolidated to 1)
data_trust_notes.nw_overrides: NW.esm GMST overrides only apply during Babylon/NW sessions, not Adventure mode. content records in NW.esm load universally
